servers.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers expose a structured, machine-readable API for your enterprise data—designed for AI-powered automation, copilots, and decision engines. By delivering a clear, contextual slice of your security environment, MCP lets you query, analyze, and optimize complex systems without building custom SDKs or parsing raw exports.

env_vars.name: ARGOS_CUSTOMER_ID
env_vars.label: Argos Customer Id
env_vars.description: Your Argos customer ID (required for all API calls)

servers.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers expose a structured, machine-readable API for your enterprise data—designed for AI-powered automation, copilots, and decision engines. By delivering a clear, contextual slice of your security environment, MCP lets you query, analyze, and optimize complex systems without building custom SDKs or parsing raw exports.

env_vars.name: CPINFO_CACHE_TTL_MS
env_vars.label: Cpinfo Cache Ttl Ms
env_vars.description: Override the idle eviction window (default: 10,800,000 ms ≈ 3 hours).

servers.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers expose a structured, machine-readable API for your enterprise data—designed for AI-powered automation, copilots, and decision engines. By delivering a clear, contextual slice of your security environment, MCP lets you query, analyze, and optimize complex systems without building custom SDKs or parsing raw exports.

env_vars.name: CLIENT_ID
env_vars.label: Client Id
env_vars.description: Client ID for authentication with Check Point Documentation Tool (required)

env_vars.name: SECRET_KEY
env_vars.label: Secret Key
env_vars.description: Secret Key for authentication with Check Point Documentation Tool (required)

env_vars.name: AUTH_URL
env_vars.label: Auth Url
env_vars.description: Authentication URL copied from the API key creation dialog (e.g. `https://cloudinfra-gw.portal.checkpoint.com/auth/external`). Recommended — the path suffix is stripped automatically so you can paste it directly. When set, `REGION` is inferred and does not need to be set separately.

env_vars.name: REGION
env_vars.label: Region
env_vars.description: Short region code — `EU`, `US`, `STG`, or `LOCAL` (default: `EU`). Use this instead of `AUTH_URL` for backwards-compatible configurations.

servers.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is an open standard that enables AI agents to interact with external tools, services, and data sources in a secure and structured way. It defines a consistent interface for AI systems to discover and use capabilities such as reading files, querying databases, or sending messages through APIs.

env_vars.name: API_KEY
env_vars.label: Api Key
env_vars.description: Your Harmony SASE API key

env_vars.name: MANAGEMENT_HOST
env_vars.label: Management Host
env_vars.description: Your Harmony SASE management API URL (e.g., `https://api.your-management-host.com/api`)

env_vars.name: ORIGIN
env_vars.label: Origin
env_vars.description: Your tenant origin domain (e.g., `https://your.origin-domain.com`)

servers.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers expose a structured, machine-readable API for your enterprise data—designed for AI-powered automation, copilots, and decision engines. env_vars.name: API_KEY
env_vars.label: Api Key
env_vars.description: Your Smart-1 Cloud API key

env_vars.name: S1C_URL
env_vars.label: S1c Url
env_vars.description: Your Smart-1 Cloud tenant "Web-API" URL

env_vars.name: MANAGEMENT_HOST
env_vars.label: Management Host
env_vars.description: IP address or hostname of your management server

env_vars.name: PORT
env_vars.label: Port
env_vars.description: (Optional) Management server port (default: 443)

env_vars.name: USERNAME
env_vars.label: Username
env_vars.description: Username for authentication (if using username/password authentication)

env_vars.name: PASSWORD
env_vars.label: Password
env_vars.description: Password for authentication (if using username/password authentication)

servers.description: - Provides a threat classification for a given URL, file hash, or IP address

env_vars.name: API_KEY
env_vars.label: Api Key
env_vars.description: Your API key

servers.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is an open standard that enables AI agents to interact with external tools, services, and data sources in a secure and structured way. It defines a consistent interface for AI systems to discover and use capabilities such as reading files, querying databases, or sending messages through APIs.

A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides seamless integration with Check Point's Threat Emulation and Anti-Virus cloud services. This server enables AI assistants to perform comprehensive malware analysis, file scanning, and threat detection through a simple, standardized interface.

env_vars.name: API_KEY
env_vars.label: Api Key
env_vars.description: Your Check Point Threat Emulation API key
